title: My Immediate World
description: Module Two — Immediate environment: describing friends and places with adjectives of quality, possessive adjectives, where-questions and prepositions, yes/no questions, the present progressive for actions happening now, polite requests with can at the airport, and invitations with would and what about at lunch time
sources: Let's Learn English — 7th year Basic Education, Teacher's Book (CNP 541702) — Module Two
English Programme for Basic Education, Ministry of Education, Tunisia (March 2005)
